summary: Frontend UI verification after seed hardening and .to_list(50000) change. All 5 requested flows pass. Admin login redirects to /admin with all 4 KPI (Referenze/Entrate/Box/Clienti) visible. Client (avesta) login redirects to /app. Wrong password shows data-testid=login-error 'Email o password non corretti' without redirect. Logout + re-login admin works. Dashboard, Ricezione merce (/admin/entrate) and Preparazioni (/admin/preparazioni) load with no page errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Console shows 401 responses on /login page load (likely /api/auth/me while unauthenticated). Not a bug — expected — but could be silenced client-side to reduce console noise.
test_credentials: Admin aimagosrl@gmail.com / Aimago123@! ; Cliente avesta@gmail.com / Avesta123! — both work.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login flows and post-login list pages verified on preview URL. Auth uses httpOnly cookie with axios withCredentials — DO NOT suggest cache/incognito fixes. Admin routes are under /admin (dashboard, /admin/entrate, /admin/preparazioni). Client area is under /app.
